headline: 2 Growth Stocks to Add to Your Roster and 1 We Find Risky

headline: AI Chips Update - AI Drives Next-Level Network Operations Innovation
summary: Mavenir has introduced its Agentic Service Assurance Framework, designed to enhance network operations through scalable, closed-loop automation using artificial intelligence. This multi-agent framework, aligned with TM Forum specifications IG1251 and IG1453, aims to accelerate autonomous network operations across multi-vendor and multi-domain environments. By capturing and automating expert workflows from Network Operations Centers (NOC), the system seeks to replicate and expand human...

headline: Forget Nvidia: Four Billionaires Who Rarely Agree on Anything Hold the Same Overlooked Chip Stock
summary: Four billionaire portfolio managers who almost never end up on the same side of a trade quietly converged on Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (NYSE:TSM). Chase Coleman’s Tiger Global added 49.38% to its Taiwan Semiconductor position. That lifted it to the fund’s fourth-largest holding at $1.04 billion. headline: Dell’s AI-Focused Spending Spree and New Debt Financing Could Be A Game Changer For Dell Technologies (DELL)
summary: Dell Technologies recently completed several fixed-income offerings totaling about US$3.0 billion in senior unsecured notes maturing between 2031 and 2037, secured a new US$6.0 billion revolving credit facility, and affirmed a quarterly dividend of US$0.63 per share payable on July 31, 2026. At the same time, Dell is expanding its role in AI infrastructure by launching Vera Rubin–based PowerEdge servers, shipping rack-scale AI systems to partners like CoreWeave, and collaborating with AMD...
